description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named py36_nose that runs in the test stage using the python:3.6 Docker image and a mongo:3.4.10 service. The job should execute the following script commands in order: apt-get update -q -y, apt-get install -y mongodb, pip install -r requirements.txt, and nosetests -v --nocapture. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
